mapper.update: update categories set name = #[name}, color = #{color}, icon = #{icon} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ctgr.id, count(*) as total_count, count(if(todos.is_completed = 0, 1, null)) as not_completed_count from categories ctgr left join todos on todos.category_id = ctgr.id where ctgr.user_id = #{userId} group by ctgr.id order by ctgr.id
select id, user_id, name, color, icon, created_at from categories where id = #{categoryId}
select id, user_id, name, color, icon, created_at from categories where name = #{name} and user_id = #{userId}
select id, user_id, name, color, icon, created_at from categories where user_id = #{userId}
